sizing_rule.note: Fixed fractional position sizing using optimal f divisor. Position Size = Account Equity / f, where f is determined dynamically based on account size and per-trade risk. Specific f value not provided by author (AUTHOR_DEVELOPING). Apply on every trade executed.

source_rule_text: Position size must be a fixed fraction of account equity on every trade, with the fraction (f) determined by account size relative to per-trade risk, to achieve fastest account growth.
